data.title: Spot gold broke through $4,120 per ounce, rising 1.30% on the day.
data.description: Market data shows that spot gold broke through $4,120 per ounce, rising 1.30% on the day. In addition, the Nasdaq index rose over 1%, Google rose 6%, Broadcom rose 3.5%, Nvidia rose 3%, and Intel rose 1.7%. (Jinshi)

data.title: Movement Foundation: Will transfer some tokens from the Ethereum mainnet MOVE strategic reserve to the native blockchain.
data.description: The Movement Foundation announced on the X platform that, four months after fulfilling its buyback commitment, to improve transparency regarding tokens in the buyback wallet, it plans to transfer a portion of the tokens from the MOVE strategic reserve on the Ethereum mainnet to the strategic reserve on the native Movement Network to support ecosystem projects and incentives. Movement stated that it will continue to regularly send ERC-20 tokens to exchanges to replenish and rebalance the token supply, thereby re-enabling withdrawal functionality.

data.title: Kraken announced that it has submitted a draft IPO registration statement to the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission.
data.description: Kraken announced that it has filed a draft registration statement on Form S-1 with the U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission (SEC) for a proposed offering of common stock. The number of shares to be offered and the price range have not yet been determined. The initial public offering is expected to take place after the SEC completes its review process, with the specific timing depending on market conditions and other factors.

data.title: Federal Reserve Governor Milan: The Federal Reserve "may" shrink its balance sheet again in the future.
data.description: Federal Reserve Governor Milan stated that the Fed "may" reduce its balance sheet again in the future. The final size of the Fed's balance sheet is determined by regulatory rules, and the Fed will support an immediate end to its quantitative easing policy at its policy meeting on October 28-29. (Jinshi)

data.title: Brother Machi's 25x leveraged ETH long position has turned from profit to loss, but he is still adding small amounts to his position.
data.description: Hyperbot data shows that Huang Licheng, known as "Brother Machi," is still adding small amounts to his 25x leveraged ETH long position, currently holding 3,875 ETH, with a position value of approximately $11.829 million. However, after a short period of floating profit today, the long position has now turned into a loss, currently showing a floating loss of approximately $45,000.

data.title: Microsoft launches Agent 365 to keep workplace AI bots in check
data.description:
Microsoft launched Agent 365 to help companies track and control the rapidly growing number of AI bots in their workplaces.
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/microsoft-launches-agent-365/

data.title: ETH Leverage Soars While Price Stalls – A Major Risk Signal?
data.description:
Binance data shows a crowded derivatives market, with investors using record leverage as ETH trades in a tight range.
source: https://cryptopotato.com/eth-leverage-soars-while-price-stalls-a-major-risk-signal/

data.title: Bitwise CEO: BSOL's total fund inflows exceed $600 million
data.description: Bitwise CEO Hunter Horsley posted on the X platform that the Bitwise Solana ETF (BSOL) saw inflows of $23 million yesterday. Since its launch three and a half weeks ago, there have been daily inflows, and the total inflows into BSOL have now exceeded $600 million, indicating that ETF investors are buying Solana.

data.title: CEA Industries disclosed that its BNB holdings increased to 515,054 tokens, worth approximately $481 million.
data.description: Nasdaq-listed BNB treasury company CEA Industries updated its holdings data, showing that as of November 18, its BNB holdings increased to 515,054, valued at approximately $481 million, with an average acquisition cost of approximately $851.29 and a total investment of approximately $438.5 million. In addition, the company disclosed that it has repurchased 1,170,306 shares since September 22, 2025, at an average price of $6.77 per share, realizing a gain of 6,506 BNB through its digital treasury strategy to date. (Globenewswire)

data.title: Crypto stocks opened lower across the board, with BitMine down 2.32%.
data.description: According to data from msx.com, US stocks opened nearly flat, with the crypto sector generally declining. Coinbase fell 0.74%, BitMine fell 2.32%, Circle fell 2.72%, and Strategy Favorites fell 2.97%. msx.com is a decentralized RWA trading platform that has listed hundreds of RWA tokens, covering US stocks and ETF tokens such as AAPL, AMZN, GOOGL, META, MSFT, NFLX, and NVDA.

data.title: Oligarchs Forced to Pay $3,000,000,000 After Masterminding ‘Highly Complex’ Bank Fraud Scheme: Report
data.description:
Two former Ukrainian billionaires will shell out more than $3 billion after they were found liable for carrying out a fraudulent scheme that cost the state-owned lender PrivatBank PJSC billions of dollars. A London judge ordered the bank’s former owners, Igor Kolomoisky and Gennady Bogolyubov, to pay about $1. 8 billion in damages and $1
source: https://dailyhodl.com/2025/11/19/oligarchs-forced-to-pay-3000000000-after-masterminding-highly-complex-bank-fraud-scheme-report/

data.title: CoinDesk 20 Performance Update: Index Declines 2.7% as All Constituents Trade Lower
data.description:
The latest performance update from CoinDesk regarding the CoinDesk 20 Index reveals a notable decline of 2.7%. This downturn is significant as it indicates that all of the constituents within the index are trading lower, reflecting a broader negative trend in the cryptocurrency market. Investors and analysts alike are keeping a close eye on these developments to assess the implications for the overall market sentiment and future performance.
source: https://www.coindesk.com/coindesk-indices/2025/11/19/coindesk-20-performance-update-index-declines-2-7-as-all-constituents-trade-lower

data.title: Layer 1 decentralized autonomous smart chain CratD2C has secured $30 million in strategic funding, with Nimbus Capital participating.
data.description: Layer 1 decentralized autonomous smart chain (DASC) CratD2 announced the completion of a $30 million strategic investment round, with participation from private alternative investment group Nimbus Capital. This funding will strengthen CratD2C's global infrastructure, expand its "12+1" diversified ecosystem, and accelerate the rollout of its flagship products within the network. CratD2C is based on the DPoS mechanism and has been audited by CertiK and Hacken. (Cryptopolitan)

data.title: It is "very likely" that Trump will hand out $2,000 checks; analysts warn it's best to take it seriously.
data.description: Aside from his staunchest allies, almost no one publicly supports Trump's idea of ​​"distributing $2,000 checks" to deliver the so-called "tariff dividend." However, Terry Haines, founder of Pangaea Policy, even stated in a report to clients this week that tax refund checks are "highly likely." He pointed out that this idea could be incorporated into the upcoming "budget reconciliation bill" in Congress, which could pass solely with Republican votes. He wrote, "Trump keeps talking about this with increasing certainty, and Trump and congressional Republicans have the legislative means to get it done, so the market should treat it as a fact today." (Jinshi)

data.title: XRP Price Slips to $2.1, Bearish Target Despite ETF Optimism?
data.description:
Key Insights The latest XRP ETF launch has captured the attention of crypto market participants. However, looking at the price action, it appears to have failed in boosting market optimism. XRP price has continued its downward trajectory over the past few weeks, falling to as low as $2. 10 amid a broader crypto market selloff
source: https://www.thecoinrepublic.com/2025/11/19/xrp-price-slips-to-2-1-analyst-reveals-bearish-target-despite-ripple-etf-optimism/

data.title: Safello Lists Physically Backed Staked TAO ETP on SIX Swiss Exchange
data.description:
Safello, a cryptocurrency exchange in the Nordics, has listed its physically backed and staked TAO Exchange Traded Product (ETP) on the SIX Swiss Exchange.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/safello-lists-physically-backed-staked-tao-etp-on-six-swiss-exchange/

data.title: Kraken's European Entity Secures Regulatory Approval for Digital Asset Custody in EU
data.description: According to PANews, Kraken's European entity, PESL, has received authorization from the Central Bank of Ireland. This approval allows PESL to operate as a compliant custodian under the EU's Markets in Crypto-Assets (MiCA) framework. The authorization enables PESL to offer regulated digital asset custody services to institutional clients within the European Economic Area.
